name: Ysursa v. Pocatello Education Association
question: Do provisions of Idaho's Voluntary Contributions Act prohibiting payroll deductions for "political activities" violate the Free Speech Clause of the First Amendment when applied to local government employees?
description: A case in which the Court found that provisions of Idaho's Voluntary Contributions Act which prohibit payroll deductions for "political activities" did not violate the First Amendment when applied to local government employees.
